ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treasury_bills" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Treasury Bill record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the Treasury Bill rate */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Series ID of the Treasury Bill */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the Treasury Bill rate */,
  "maturity" TEXT /* Maturity of the Treasury Bill */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the Treasury Bill */,
  "auction_date" TEXT /* Date of the Treasury Bill auction */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the Treasury Bill issue */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date of the Treasury Bill maturity */,
  "face_value" TEXT /* Face value of the Treasury Bill */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of Treasury Bill auction */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Status of the Treasury Bill auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treasury_bills_issue_date FOREIGN KEY ("issue_date") REFERENCES auctions ("issue_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treasury_bills_auction_date FOREIGN KEY ("auction_date") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treasury_bills_maturity_date FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_date") REFERENCES auctions ("maturity_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "date_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "series_id_accessed" TEXT /* Series ID of the data accessed */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query executed */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_series_id_accessed FOREIGN KEY ("series_id_accessed") REFERENCES treasury_bills ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_curves" (
  "curve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield curve record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the yield curve is calculated */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Series ID associated with the yield curve */,
  "yield_value" TEXT /* Calculated yield value for the maturity */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the yield curve */,
  "yield_type" TEXT /* Type of yield curve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_curves_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES treasury_bills ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Series ID of the auction */,
  "auction_date" TEXT /* Date of the auction */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the issue */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date of the maturity */,
  "face_value" TEXT /* Face value of the auction */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of auction */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Status of the auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
